caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The man is engaged in a conversation or recording a podcast, speaking into a professional microphone. The setting includes framed photographs on the wall, adding a personal touch to the environment. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session, possibly for a podcast titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner.
